error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters
title: Hugging Face model fails in AI Agent HTTP Request
symptom: When using the Hugging Face image generation model in an AI Agent HTTP Request, it returns 'Bad request - please check your parameters'. This does not occur when using the same parameters in a standard HTTP Request node.
applies_when: Using Hugging Face model in AI Agent
Correct headers and body are set
root_cause: The AI Agent HTTP Request does not handle binary file responses correctly, which is required for image generation endpoints. The absence of the 'Accept' header in the AI Agent request can also lead to a bad request error.
fix_steps: Redesign the workflow to use an HTTP node for image generation instead of the AI Agent HTTP Request.
Place the HTTP node either before or after the AI Agent based on your workflow logic.
If you want to keep using it as a tool, wrap the HTTP request in a sub-workflow that returns text instead of binary.
agent_instruction: Use an HTTP node for image generation instead of the AI Agent HTTP Request.
